name: Guide & Overview (Approved)
prompt:
Guide & Overview

I’m targeting people from {Country} who speak {Language}. Write ALL output in {Language}. {IfWritingRules}Ensure these writing rules are followed: {WritingRules}.{/IfWritingRules}
First, translate each template’s phrasing into natural, idiomatic {Language} (do not keep English words unless commonly used in {Language}).
Then generate EXACTLY 10 titles using ONLY these templates, filling [Topic], [Country], [Year] from the article. Use the year mentioned in the article content (usually 2025); do NOT use 2026 unless the article explicitly discusses 2026.
Length: 70–80 characters each. Output EXACTLY 10 titles separated only by ' | ' with no numbering, no bullet points, and no extra characters before or after each title.
Return only the 10 final titles, no placeholders or repeated versions.
Compliance: informational; no promises/urgency; no prices/discounts/free/cheap/affordable; no superlatives; no location catch-alls; no hiring/eligibility claims; avoid transactional verbs unless clearly supported.
TEMPLATES (to be localized into {Language} first):

2025 Guide to [Topic] in [Country]

Complete [Year] Guide to [Topic]

What You Should Know About [Topic] in [Country]

Key Facts on [Topic] for [Year]

An Overview of [Topic] in [Country] ([Year])

Understanding [Topic]: A Practical [Year] Guide

Beginner’s Guide to [Topic] in [Country] ([Year])

Insider Guide to [Topic]: What Matters in [Year]

Clear Guide to [Topic] for [Country] Readers ([Year])

[Year] Overview: [Topic] Explained for [Country]
Article: {Article}
description: Used for general, informative coverage. It creates neutral, structured titles that help readers understand or explore a topic in context. Ideal for educational or awareness-driven articles introducing a subject clearly and factually.

description: Engages readers through fascination and storytelling. Titles emphasize discovery, human interest, or the unexpected nature of [Topic]—designed to attract curiosity while maintaining journalistic integrity.

name: Guide & Overview Short (Google Only)
prompt:
I’m targeting people from {Country} who speak {Language}. Write ALL output in {Language}. {IfWritingRules}Ensure these writing rules are followed: {WritingRules}.{/IfWritingRules}
First, translate each template’s phrasing into natural, idiomatic {Language} (do not keep English words unless commonly used in {Language}).
Then generate EXACTLY 10 titles using ONLY these templates, filling [Topic], [Country], [Year] from the article. 
Year: always use 2025, or 2024 only if explicitly about 2024. 
Length: MAX 25 characters each. Output EXACTLY 10 titles separated only by ' | ', no numbering, no bullet points, no extra characters before/after each title.
Return only the 10 final titles, no placeholders or repeated versions.
Compliance: informational; no promises/urgency; no prices/discounts/free/cheap/affordable; no superlatives; no location catch-alls; no hiring/eligibility claims; avoid transactional verbs unless supported.

TEMPLATES (to be localized into {Language} first):
1) [Topic] 2025
2) [Country] [Topic]
3) Guide: [Topic]
4) [Topic] Facts
5) [Year] [Topic] Info
6) [Topic] Overview
7) [Topic] Insights
8) About [Topic]
9) Learn [Topic]
10) [Topic] 2025 Tips

Article: {Article}
description: Shorter Version of Used for general, informative coverage. It creates neutral, structured titles that help readers understand or explore a topic in context. Ideal for educational or awareness-driven articles introducing a subject clearly and factually.
